name: File Permissions Modification on Linux
description: Detects chmod being used to make files executable in suspicious directories
query:
// Detect chmod making files executable in temp directories
// Trigger on chmod +x in /tmp, /dev/shm, or user directories
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)chmod\s+\+x\s+(/tmp/|/dev/shm/|/var/tmp/)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
